watchers.question: The watcher in this exercise is supposed to increment the 'count' data property by one every time 'rangeVal' data property changes.
watchers.code:
<script>
  const app = Vue.createApp({
    data() {
      return {
      	rangeVal: 70,
        count: 0
      }
    },
    watch: {
      @(8)() {
        this.count++
      }
    }
  })
 app.mount('#app')
</script>
watchers.solution:
<script>
  const app = Vue.createApp({
    data() {
      return {
      	rangeVal: 70,
        count: 0
      }
    },
    watch: {
      rangeVal() {
        this.count++
      }
    }
  })
 app.mount('#app')
</script>
watchers.prompt_zh: 練習中的 watcher 應該在 'rangeVal' 資料屬性變更時，把 'count' 加 1

watchers.question: Write the missing code so that the watcher activates a warning class when the value is lower than 40.
watchers.code: {{ rangeVal }}
watchers.solution: {{ rangeVal }}
watchers.prompt_zh: 補上缺少的程式碼，讓 watcher 在值小於 40 時啟用 warning class

watchers.question: Both the @(3) value and the @(3) value are available as input arguments to a watcher method.
watchers.code: Both the @(3) value and the @(3) value are available as input arguments to a watcher method.
watchers.solution: Both the old value and the new value are available as input arguments to a watcher method.
alternatives: Both the new value and the old value are available as input arguments to a watcher method.
watchers.prompt_zh: watcher 方法的參數同時可以拿到 @(3) 值與 @(3) 值（提示：new、old）

components.question: With props we can pass data to the components via custom @(10) to the component tag.
components.code: With props we can pass data to the components via custom @(10) to the component tag.
components.solution: With props we can pass data to the components via custom attributes to the component tag.
alternatives: With props we can pass data to the components via custom attribute to the component tag.
With props we can pass data to the components via custom atribute to the component tag.
With props we can pass data to the components via custom atributes to the component tag.
components.prompt_zh: 用 props 可以透過元件標籤上的自訂 @(10)（attributes）把資料傳進元件

components.prompt_zh: 元件中要寫什麼，才能接收 App.vue 透過 'fish-name' 屬性傳來的 prop？

components.question: When generating elements with v-for, which specific attribute is always recommended to use?
components.prompt_zh: 用 v-for 產生元素時，建議一定要加哪個特殊屬性？（提示：key）

components.question: Props are used to send data from the parent element to the child component, and @(7) is used to to pass information from the child component to the parent.
components.code:
Props are used to send data 
from the parent element to the child component, 
and @(7) is used to to pass information 
from the child component to the parent.
components.solution:
Props are used to send data 
from the parent element to the child component, 
and $emit() is used to to pass information 
from the child component to the parent.
alternatives:
Props are used to send data 
from the parent element to the child component, 
and emit() is used to to pass information 
from the child component to the parent.

Props are used to send data 
from the parent element to the child component, 
and $emit is used to to pass information 
from the child component to the parent.

Props are used to send data 
from the parent element to the child component, 
and emit is used to to pass information 
from the child component to the parent.
components.prompt_zh: props 用來把資料從父元件傳給子元件，@(7) 用來反向把訊息傳回（提示：emits）

components.question: Set the root element of the 'fish-type' component to belong to the 'blue' CSS class (create a fallthrough attribute).
alternatives: <fish-type class='blue' />
components.prompt_zh: 把 'fish-type' 元件的根元素設為屬於 'blue' 這個 CSS class（建立 fallthrough 屬性）

components.question: With more than one root element in a component, like in the example below, we can define on which root element a fallthrough attribute should be applied.
components.prompt_zh: 當元件有多個根元素時，我們可以指定 fallthrough 屬性要套用到哪個根元素

components.question: How can we make the 'comp-one' component available locally, only to one component?
components.solution:
<script> 
  import CompOne from './components/CompOne.vue';

  export default {
    components: {
      'comp-one': CompOne
    }
  }
</script>
components.prompt_zh: 如何讓 'comp-one' 元件只在某個元件本地可用？

slots.code:

{{ dataFromSlot.lclData }}

lifecycle-hooks.question: The @(13) lifecycle hook is called just before a component is removed from the DOM.

just before a component is removed from the DOM.
lifecycle-hooks.solution:

just before a component is removed from the DOM.
lifecycle-hooks.prompt_zh: @(13) 生命週期 hook 在元件即將從 DOM 移除前被呼叫（提示：beforeUnmount）

lifecycle-hooks.solution: We need the 'activated' and 'deactivated' lifecycle hooks for that.
lifecycle-hooks.prompt_zh: 動態元件只 mount 一次，但目前顯示（active）的元件可以切換

provide-inject.prompt_zh: 'fishName' 從 App.vue provide 出來，本元件如何取得它？（提示：inject）

routing.question: How does routing work in Vue?
routing.code:
Routing in Vue is used to @(8) the Vue application, 
and it happens on the client side (in the @(7)) 
without full page reload, which results in a @(6) 
user experience.
routing.solution:
Routing in Vue is used to navigate the Vue application, 
and it happens on the client side (in the browser) 
without full page reload, which results in a faster 
user experience.
alternatives:
Routing in Vue is used to navigate the Vue application, 
and it happens on the client side (in the browser) 
without full page reload, which results in a better 
user experience.

routing.prompt_zh: Vue 路由設定在 'main.js' 檔內
